summary: Verified file management controls for healthcare compliance documents. All features working: three-dot menu with Edit Details/Replace File/Remove File/View History, soft-delete with mandatory reason, replace with superseded status, and audit trail.
passed_tests: Navigate to employee profile OCS-0001 (Olakunle Alonge) - SUCCESS
Navigate to What's Needed tab - SUCCESS
Three-dot menu shows Edit Details option - SUCCESS
Three-dot menu shows Replace File option - SUCCESS
Three-dot menu shows Remove File option - SUCCESS
Three-dot menu shows View History option - SUCCESS
Remove File dialog opens with mandatory reason field - SUCCESS
Remove File dialog shows file info and upload date - SUCCESS
Remove File dialog notes reason will be recorded in audit trail - SUCCESS
Replace File dialog opens with file input and reason field - SUCCESS
Replace File dialog shows which file is being replaced - SUCCESS
Replace File dialog notes old file will be marked as superseded - SUCCESS
View History dialog opens showing file operations timeline - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /remove endpoint requires reason (min 3 chars) - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /replace endpoint requires reason and file - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /history endpoint returns audit trail structure - SUCCESS
Backend: Audit trail captures user_id, action_type, timestamp, reason - SUCCESS
Backend: Soft-delete marks file as 'removed' not hard delete - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee OCS-0001 (Olakunle Alonge) with Right to Work Documents evidence files
context_for_next_testing_agent: File management controls verified. Three-dot menu on requirements with evidence shows: Edit Details, Replace File, Remove File, View History. Remove endpoint at POST /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/remove requires mandatory reason (min 3 chars) and marks file as 'removed' (soft-delete). Replace endpoint at POST /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id}/replace requires file and reason, marks old file as 'superseded'. History endpoint at GET /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/history returns audit trail with user_id, action_type, timestamp, reason. Employee OCS-0001 has 3 files for Right to Work Documents requirement.
